Build a typed KV tier from a byte backend and codec.

## Import

```ts
import { kvStorage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function kvStorage(opts: KvStorageOptions<T>): KvStorageTier<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `KvStorageOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `KvStorageTier<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { kvStorage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```
